objectives.text: Speak with the calcified sign at the crossroads.
Find Edrin Holt in the wheat fields.
Check the farm family for Edrin.
Return to Edrin with what you found.

stages.description: A calcified man has been used as a living road sign at the Ash Road crossroads.
Garron Holt asked you to check on his brother Edrin, who was taken to the farm fields.
Edrin Holt still cares for the family that tied him into the wheat. Find out what happened to them.
The farm family has been raised on crosses in the yard. Edrin is waiting for your answer.
You answered Edrin Holt. Truth or mercy, the wheat has gone quiet again.
